text: Learning to play the piano has taught me a lot about mastering any new skill. At first, I struggled with simple chords, but consistent practice made a big difference. Patience was essential—I had to accept that I wouldn't become a virtuoso overnight. I used various resources, like online tutorials and a beginner's book, to guide my learning. To stay motivated, I tracked my progress by recording short pieces each week and listening for improvements. Celebrating small successes, like playing a song without mistakes, kept my motivation high. Now, I can perform for friends, and the journey itself has been incredibly rewarding.
